app.name: ClanDi
app.tagline: Training, tracking, and closing Wikipedia knowledge gaps
landing.hero_title: Edit Wikipedia. Close Knowledge Gaps. Build Power.
landing.hero_subtitle: ClanDi is a free, bilingual tool that trains volunteers to improve Wikipedia content on reproductive justice, Latino heritage, and underrepresented communities.
landing.mission_text: Wikipedia gets 15 billion page views a month, but Latino, BIPOC, and reproductive justice stories are still underrepresented. ClanDi helps close those gaps by giving communities the tools, training, and support to shape what millions read every day.
landing.feature_learn_desc: Step-by-step modules walk you through Wikipedia editing — no experience required.
landing.feature_find_desc: Discover what's missing or outdated so your edits make the biggest impact.
landing.feature_track_desc: See your contributions, pageviews, and progress in real time.
landing.feature_grow_desc: Earn badges, build skills, and level up from newcomer to mentor.
dashboard.no_activity: Start your journey! Complete a training module to begin.
training.title: Wiki 101 Training
training.subtitle: Master Wikipedia editing through 6 progressive modules
gaps.title: Knowledge Gap Finder
gaps.subtitle: Find Wikipedia articles missing between English and Spanish
tracker.title: Impact Tracker
tracker.subtitle: See how your edits are changing Wikipedia
tracker.no_data: No contribution data yet. Click 'Refresh Stats' to fetch your Wikipedia edits.
profile.title: Your Profile
profile.no_badges: No badges yet. Complete training modules and make edits to earn badges!
